name: Corn Chowder#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the corn and creamed corn, keeping the creamed corn in its cans.
2. Pour the milk into both cans, then add the corn to a large pot.
3. Dice the onions and potatoes.
4. Add the diced onions and potatoes to the pot with the corn and milk mixture.
5. Cook on low heat until simmering.
6. Fry the bacon until it is crispy, then drain on paper towel.
7. Remove the grease from the pot.
8. Add the cooked bacon to the pot.
9. Continue cooking until the potatoes are done.
10. Serve for a comforting dish on cold winter days.
